instruction.text:
Choose the correct verb/word to fill in the blank in each sentence. 
සෑම වාක්‍යයකම හිස්තැන පිරවීම සඳහා නිවැරදි ක්‍රියා පදය/වචනය තෝරන්න.
ஒவ்வொரு வாக்கியத்திலும் வெற்றிடத்தை நிரப்ப சரியான வினைச்சொல்/சொல்லை தேர்ந்தெடுக்கவும்.

content.question: The forged shaft is ______ the cast shaft under high torque.
Lubricated bearings are ______ dry bearings during continuous operation.
Gear-driven systems are ______ belt-driven systems for heavy loads.
Solid steel frames are ______ than hollow frames, reducing vibration.
This is ______ cutting method for precision machining.
CNC milling is ______ machining option for complex components.
The bearing ______ fail because the lubrication system is already blocked.
I ______ replace the worn coupling before the machine is restarted.
Cast-iron housings are ______ components used in heavy machinery.
The shaft ______ bend if the load exceeds the design limit.
Operators ______ stop the machine before changing the tool.
Workers ______ remove guards while the machine is running.
The maintenance team ______ align the gearbox tomorrow, as it is on the approved schedule.
The hydraulic press ______ operate safely if the pressure valve is faulty.
The machine lubrication system ______ be inspected before long-term operation.

instruction.text:
Click on the correct answer.
නිවැරදි පිළිතුර මත ක්ලික් කරන්න.
சரியான பதிலில் கிளிக் செய்யவும்.

content.question: Click on the correct sentence/ answer.
options: The operator can stops the machine if it overheats.
The operator must stop the machine if it overheats.
The operator might not stopping the machine if it overheats.
content.answer: The operator must stop the machine if it overheats.

content.question: Click on the correct sentence/ answer.
options: You shouldn’t remove the safety guard during operation.
You might not removing the safety guard during operation.
You mustn’t be able to removing the safety guard during operation.
content.answer: You shouldn’t remove the safety guard during operation.

content.question: What should the mechanic use to tighten the loose bolt?
What should the technician add to reduce friction in the bearing?
Click on the correct sentence/ answer.
options: I am going to inspect the gearbox tomorrow as it is on the service plan.
I will go to inspect the gearbox tomorrow as it in service plan.
I will be going to inspect the gearbox tomorrow as it on servicing plan.
content.answer: I am going to inspect the gearbox tomorrow as it is on the service plan.

content.question: Do you know why the motor is making a loud noise?
options: I’m not sure. It may be a worn bearing or it might be shaft misalignment.
I’m not sure. It should be a worn bearing or it should be shaft misalignment.
I’m not sure. It can be a worn bearing or it mustn’t be shaft misalignment.
content.answer: I’m not sure. It may be a worn bearing or it might be shaft misalignment.

content.question: What should the technician pour into the hydraulic system?
Will the mechanic complete the shaft alignment soon?
options: Yes, he will finish in about twenty minutes.
Yes, they are going to finish in few minutes.
Yes, soon he will finish about minutes.
content.answer: Yes, he will finish in about twenty minutes.

content.question: Will the technician replace the damaged coupling soon?
options: Yes, he will replace it tomorrow.
Yes, they are going to replace it for tomorrow.
Yes, soon they will replace tomorrow.
content.answer: Yes, he will replace it tomorrow.

content.question: Click on the correct sentence/ answer.
options: Steel gears are stronger than plastic gears.
Steel gears are more than strong than plastic gears.
Steel gears are the more stronger than plastic gears.
content.answer: Steel gears are stronger than plastic gears.

content.question: Click on the correct sentence/ answer.
options: Ball bearings are smoother than plain bearings.
Ball bearings are more than smooth than plain bearings.
Ball bearings are the more smooth than plain bearings.
content.answer: Ball bearings are smoother than plain bearings.

content.question: Click on the correct sentence/ answer.
options: A forged shaft is more durable than a cast shaft.
A forged shaft is more than durable than a cast shaft.
A forged shaft is the more durable than a cast shaft.
content.answer: A forged shaft is more durable than a cast shaft.

content.question: Click on the correct sentence/ answer.
options: A belt drive is the quietest drive.
A belt drive is more than quiet drive.
A belt drive is the more quiet drive.
content.answer: A belt drive is the quietest drive.

content.question: Click on the correct sentence/ answer.
options: A lathe machine is the sharpest for drilling operations.
A lathe machine is more than sharp for drilling operations.
A lathe machine is the more sharpest for drilling operations.
content.answer: A lathe machine is the sharpest for drilling operations.

content.question: Do you know why the pump pressure is unstable?
options: I’m not sure. It may be a blocked filter or it might be air in the line.
I’m not sure. It should be a blocked filter or it should be air in the line.
I’m not sure. It can be a blocked filter or it mustn’t be air in the line.
content.answer: I’m not sure. It may be a blocked filter or it might be air in the line.

instruction.text:
Rearrange these sentences in the correct order. The first word of each sentence starts with a capital letter.
මෙම වාක්‍යයන් නිවැරදි අනුපිළිවෙලට නැවත සකසන්න. සෑම වාක්‍යයකම පළමු වචනය විශාල අකුරින් ආරම්භ වේ.
இந்த வாக்கியங்களை சரியான வரிசையில் மறுசீரமைக்கவும். ஒவ்வொரு வாக்கியத்தின் முதல் வார்த்தையும் பெரிய எழுத்தில் தொடங்குகிறது.

content.sentence: Workers must never remove guards during machine operation.
Operators mustn't use machines without proper protective equipment.
Do technicians check tools before starting daily work?
Will the machine fail during heavy load conditions?
The mechanic tightened the bolts and checked the pressure yesterday.
alternative_answers: The mechanic checked the pressure and tightened the bolts yesterday.

content.sentence: Students are wearing helmets while observing welding operations.
We are going to inspect pumps tomorrow morning.
Bring a cap and enough water for the trip.
alternative_answers: Bring enough water and a cap for the trip.

content.sentence: Everyone must follow all rules and signs at sites.
alternative_answers: Everyone must follow all signs and rules at sites.

content.sentence: The factory needs more tools and equipment.
alternative_answers: The factory needs more equipment and tools.

instruction.text:
Drag and drop the following adjectives into the appropriate boxes.
පහත නාම විශේෂණ අදාළ කොටු තුළට ඇද දමන්න.
பின்வரும் உரிச்சொற்களை உரிய பெட்டிகளுக்குள் இழுத்து விடவும்.

Read the following passage and answer the questions given below. 
පහත දැක්වෙන ඡේදය කියවා ඉන්පසු දී ඇති ප්‍රශ්නවලට පිළිතුරු සපයන්න.
பின்வரும் பத்தியைப் படித்து, அதற்குக் கீழே கொடுக்கப்பட்டுள்ள வினாக்களுக்கு விடையளிக்கவும்.

transcript_dialogue.speaker: speaker_1
transcript_dialogue.name: Supervisor
transcript_dialogue.text: Good morning. Thank you for coming. As student representatives, I want to plan the industrial zone field trip with you properly. First, we need to decide which industrial station to visit.

transcript_dialogue.speaker: speaker_2
transcript_dialogue.name: Student 1
transcript_dialogue.text: Sir, we discussed three options: the fabrication plant, the packaging factory, and the power distribution centre.

transcript_dialogue.speaker: speaker_1
transcript_dialogue.name: Supervisor
transcript_dialogue.text: Good. Which one do you think is the best for your current syllabus?

transcript_dialogue.speaker: speaker_3
transcript_dialogue.name: Student 2
transcript_dialogue.text: The fabrication plant is more relevant than the packaging factory because we are studying machining and welding now.

transcript_dialogue.speaker: speaker_4
transcript_dialogue.name: Student 3
transcript_dialogue.text: Also, the fabrication plant is the closest site, so travel time will be shorter.

transcript_dialogue.speaker: speaker_1
transcript_dialogue.name: Supervisor
transcript_dialogue.text: I agree. It is also the safest option because it has clear walkways and strict safety rules. Now, let’s talk about the route. Which route should we take?

transcript_dialogue.speaker: speaker_2
transcript_dialogue.name: Student 1
transcript_dialogue.text: The highway route is faster than the town road, but traffic is sometimes heavier.

transcript_dialogue.speaker: speaker_3
transcript_dialogue.name: Student 2
transcript_dialogue.text: The town road is slower, but it is less crowded in the morning.

transcript_dialogue.speaker: speaker_1
transcript_dialogue.name: Supervisor
transcript_dialogue.text: We will take the highway. It is still the quickest route overall. Now, about transportation—we will use two buses. Each bus has 40 seats, so numbers are important.

transcript_dialogue.speaker: speaker_4
transcript_dialogue.name: Student 3
transcript_dialogue.text: Sir, we have 72 students, 3 instructors, and 1 technician.

transcript_dialogue.speaker: speaker_1
transcript_dialogue.name: Supervisor
transcript_dialogue.text: Good. Now let’s list items to take.

transcript_dialogue.speaker: speaker_2
transcript_dialogue.name: Student 1
transcript_dialogue.text: We need ID cards, safety helmets, and reflective vests.

transcript_dialogue.speaker: speaker_3
transcript_dialogue.name: Student 2
transcript_dialogue.text: We should also take water, first-aid supplies, and protective gloves.

transcript_dialogue.speaker: speaker_1
transcript_dialogue.name: Supervisor
transcript_dialogue.text: Correct. Please count the number of helmets and vests we require and make sure there is enough water, not just a few bottles.

transcript_dialogue.speaker: speaker_4
transcript_dialogue.name: Student 3
transcript_dialogue.text: What about food, sir?

transcript_dialogue.speaker: speaker_1
transcript_dialogue.name: Supervisor
transcript_dialogue.text: Light snacks are allowed, but eating inside the plant is prohibited. Behaviour is very important. This visit is more formal than a normal class trip.

transcript_dialogue.speaker: speaker_2
transcript_dialogue.name: Student 1
transcript_dialogue.text: We will remind everyone to follow instructions.

transcript_dialogue.speaker: speaker_1
transcript_dialogue.name: Supervisor
transcript_dialogue.text: Good. At the site, no running, no shouting, and no touching machines. Safety is the highest priority. Phones must stay in bags so that no one is distracted.

transcript_dialogue.speaker: speaker_3
transcript_dialogue.name: Student 2
transcript_dialogue.text: Understood, sir.

transcript_dialogue.speaker: speaker_1
transcript_dialogue.name: Supervisor
transcript_dialogue.text: Finally, discipline during travel matters. Stay seated, keep aisles clear, and respect the driver. If we behave well, future trips will be easier to approve of.

transcript_dialogue.speaker: speaker_2
transcript_dialogue.name: Students
transcript_dialogue.text: Thank you, sir. We will inform the batch and prepare properly.

content.question: Why did the supervisor finally choose the fabrication plant for the visit?
content.answer: Because it matches the students’ current studies and is safer and closer than the other options.
options: Because they are studying packaging now and it is relevant to their studies.
Because it matches the students’ current studies and is safer and closer than the other options.
Because it is safer, and the long journey allows them to enjoy the trip.

content.question: What was the main reason for choosing the highway route instead of the town road?
content.answer: Because the highway is still the fastest overall option despite possible traffic.
options: Because the highway has less traffic at all times and is faster.
Because the town road is dangerous for buses.
Because the highway is still the fastest overall option despite possible traffic.

content.question: What does the supervisor’s comment about behaviour suggest about future field trips?
content.answer: Good behaviour can make future trips easier to approve.
options: Poor behaviour will only affect this trip.
Discipline is less important during travel than at the site.
Good behaviour can make future trips easier to approve.

content.question: Why are phones restricted during the site visit?
content.answer: Because safety and attention are more important at the site.
options: Because phones are not allowed on buses.
Because students are not trusted to use technology.
Because safety and attention are more important at the site.

content.question: What does the supervisor’s approach to planning the trip show about his priorities?
content.answer: He balances learning value, safety, logistics, and student behaviour.
options: He is focused on safety and giving the students an enjoyable trip.
He balances learning value, safety, logistics, and student behaviour.
He makes decisions with the student representatives so he can blame them if things go wrong.
